zh.lifeSummary: 當Roesia Pantulf於大約1228年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親William Pantulf59歲，母親Adeline de Verdun28歲。她於1270年與Richard Trussell結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1294年在她的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roesia Pantulf于大约1228年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲William Pantulf59岁，母亲Adeline de Verdun28岁。她于1270年与Richard Trussell结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1294年在她的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roesia
meanings: A baptismal name derived, like the surname Rous, Rouse, Rowse, from Old French rous, red; from Latin rufus.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roesia Pantulf was born about 1228, in Staffordshire, England, her father, William Pantulf, was 59 and her mother, Adeline de Verdun, was 28. She married Richard Trussell in 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1294, in her hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roesia Pantulf est née environ 1228, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Pantulf, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Verdun, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Trussell en 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1294, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roesia Pantulf um 1228 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pantulf 59 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Verdun 28. Sie hat 1270 Richard Trussell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1294 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roesia Pantulf è nata il circa 1228 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, William Pantulf, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Verdun, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard Trussell nel 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1294, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roesia Pantulfが約1228年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Pantulfは59歳，母Adeline de Verdunは28歳であった。1270年にRichard Trussellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1294年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roesia Pantulf(이)가 대략 1228년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pantulf(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Verdun(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1270년 Richard Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roesia Pantulf nasceu aproximadamente 1228, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pantulf, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Verdun, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Trussell em 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1294, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roesia Pantulf родилась около 1228 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pantulf было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Verdun, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Trussell в 1270 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1294 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roesia Pantulf nació aproximadamente 1228, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pantulf, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Adeline de Verdun, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard Trussell en 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1294, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
